title: Anatomy of a Ricardian Contract
description: A diagram showing the components of a Ricardian contract and how they integrate legal prose with executable code on a blockchain.
relationships: The Legal Prose Document is cryptographically signed to create a unique Hash
The Hash is recorded on the Blockchain Ledger for immutability and proof of existence
The Hash is also embedded within the Smart Contract Code, tethering the legal agreement to its execution
The Smart Contract Code is deployed and executed on the Blockchain Ledger
